etymology.description: Depicts flowing water -> stylized as 巛 -> related to 水(水) (shuǐ, "water") and 川(川) (chuān, "river")
etymology.interpretation: The character 巛 is a pictogram representing the flow of water, commonly associated with its related forms 水(水) (shuǐ, "water") and 川(川) (chuān, "river"), depicting similar concepts of flowing water.
